title: Dimorphanthera macbainii
taxonomy: Dimorphanthera macbainii is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a member of the genus Dimorphanthera, which is native to Southeast Asia. The genus Dimorphanthera is part of the order Ericales and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the Ericaceae family, Dimorphanthera macbainii is further classified under the subfamily Vaccinioideae. This classification places Dimorphanthera macbainii among the heath family of plants.
